pi_items.source: DICOM PixelSpacing and SliceThickness metadata from all 100 slices in /examples/blue_sky_plan_env/data/dicom/
DICOM Rows, Columns, and slice count from /examples/blue_sky_plan_env/data/dicom/ directory
Cannot be independently verified - tolerance value is relative to ground truth which is itself incorrect
Cannot be independently verified - tolerance constraint depends on ground truth dimensions being correct

privileged_info_summary: The task metadata contains critical errors. The actual DICOM dataset contains 100 slices of 256×256 pixels with 0.4mm isotropic voxel size, but the task metadata falsely claims dimensions of 512×512×400 with 0.3mm voxels. The voxel size error is 33% (0.3 vs 0.4mm), and all three dimension values are incorrect by factors of 2-4. The data source is real public DICOM samples from rubomedical.com, not synthetic data.
